entries.definition:
ṭ-ḥ-w/y wide, expansive, level land, to stretch out, to expand, to spread out. Of this root, طَحَا ṭaḥā occurs once in the Qurʾan.
طَحَا ṭaḥā ū [v. trans.] to spread out, to stretch out (91:6) وَالْأَرْضِ وَمَا طَحَاهَا and by the earth and how He spread it.
entries.definition_english:
ṭ-ḥ-w/y wide, expansive, level land, to stretch out, to expand, to spread out. Of this root, طَحَا ṭaḥā occurs once in the Qurʾan.
طَحَا ṭaḥā ū [v. trans.] to spread out, to stretch out (91:6) وَالْأَرْضِ وَمَا طَحَاهَا and by the earth and how He spread it.
